name: Fish Batter
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip moistened fish pieces evenly but lightly in the flour.
2. Dust off any excess flour and allow pieces to air dry on wax paper, about 5 minutes.
3. Whisk the pancake mix with the club soda until it reaches a consistency similar to buttermilk – pourable, but not too thin and not too thick.
4. Beat in the onion powder and seasoned salt into the batter.
5. Dip floured fillets into batter and drop them into 425°F oil in a heavy saucepan using a meat thermometer.
6. Brown for about 4 minutes per side.
7. Arrange on a cookie sheet in an oven preheated to 325°F until all pieces have been cooked.
